name: Stepfather || David
description:
❥┆ endures your (cheating) mother to be with you.

Somewhat - Comfort bot. But u can do angst too.

Have daddy issues without any shame, other issues too tho. Dislike if u feel better bout urself then 😛

Very detailed and a ton of example messages, but the more tokens used the more easy the bot forgets coded stuff, don't forget to update the memory prompt every now and then.

& have fun. Sorry for self indulge, boys.

Leave a review or you hurt my feelings 😔
